purpose: Catalog of external datasets for validating GoHome edge vision algorithms before tuning models and thresholds.

datasets.name: COCO / COCO-Pose
datasets.size_note: Large; use validation split and person/keypoint subset first.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Baseline for person boxes and pose keypoints; not elderly-home-specific.
caveats: Image dataset, not video; weak for temporal fall/action logic.

datasets.name: Open Images V7
datasets.size_note: Very large; sample validation images by class labels only.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Good source of broad negative cases and indoor objects for false-positive testing.
caveats: Some image-level labels are machine generated; verify label quality before training.

datasets.name: D-Fire
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Best first public source for fire/smoke object detection model evaluation.
caveats: Image dataset; still needs surveillance video validation for temporal logic.

datasets.name: Smoke and Fire Detection Videos Dataset
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Useful to validate temporal fire/smoke rules, not just single-frame color heuristics.
caveats: Check provider terms before commercial use.

datasets.name: UR Fall Detection Dataset
datasets.size_note: 70 sequences: 30 falls and 40 activities of daily living.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Small but suitable for first fall-vs-ADL temporal rule regression.
caveats: Kinect setup differs from normal home IP camera; use as regression, not final accuracy proof.

datasets.name: GMDCSA24: A Dataset for Human Fall Detection in Videos
datasets.size_note: Four subjects with separately downloadable fall and ADL videos.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Indoor side/front views include chair falls, walking falls, sleeping, reading, sitting and bending.
caveats: Staged falls; use for regression, not as product accuracy proof.

datasets.name: Wikimedia Commons curated indoor negatives
datasets.size_note: Five manually curated thumbnails; per-file license metadata is saved in the manifest.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Direct regression for sofas, cabinets, windows and empty living rooms being mistaken for people.
caveats: Manually verify every curated image remains person-free if the title list changes.

datasets.name: NTU RGB+D / NTU RGB+D 120
datasets.size_note: Large; RGB videos are over 100GB. Skeleton modality is smaller and useful.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Strong source for daily actions and health-related actions.
caveats: Requires request approval and release agreement; privacy/demo restrictions apply.

datasets.name: EatSense
datasets.size_note: 135 long RGBD videos averaging about 11 minutes each.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Best known public match for eating/drinking behavior, but not edge-lightweight.
caveats: Research dataset; validate license and download terms before product use.

datasets.name: Kinetics
datasets.size_note: Hundreds of thousands of short clips depending on version.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Good for model pretraining/reference; too broad for direct elderly-home validation.
caveats: YouTube link availability changes; licensing is video-source dependent.

datasets.name: UCF101
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Useful for action-recognition tooling tests, not elderly-home specific.
caveats: Mostly unconstrained YouTube clips; limited direct coverage of our target events.

datasets.name: VIRAT Video Dataset
datasets.size_note: Ground camera release has hours of HD surveillance video.
datasets.fit_for_gohome: Good for stressing surveillance video pipelines and background motion.
caveats: Outdoor/public scenes, not home elder care; access terms vary by release.
